check-all.sh.general_idea: Add fallback mechanism for port checking when netcat is not installed
check-all.sh.after:
if command -v nc >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    if nc -z localhost "$port"; then
      echo -e "${GREEN}✅ $name port $port is open${NC}"
    else
      echo -e "${RED}❌ $name port $port is not open${NC}"
    fi
    return
  fi

  if bash -c "</dev/tcp/localhost/$port" >/dev/null 2>&1; then

services/transaction-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.5.0 to align with Java 21 support and latest framework features.
Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in the service.
Pin PostgreSQL driver version to 42.7.3 for consistency and security.
Override Jackson databind version to 2.17.0 to address security vulnerabilities.
Override SnakeYAML version to 2.3 to address security vulnerabilities.
Override Logback core version to 1.5.3 to address security vulnerabilities.
Override Logback classic version to 1.5.3 to address security vulnerabilities.
Override Tomcat embedded core version to 10.1.20 for compatibility and security.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter for monitoring and metrics capabilities.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter for bean validation support.
Add Caffeine caching library for high-performance caching.
Add OWASP Dependency Check Maven plugin to scan for vulnerable dependencies.
Add Maven profile to conditionally enable dependency check based on NVD API key availability.

services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Add imports for new AI fraud detection and blockchain integration clients and DTOs.
Add imports for logging, date formatting, and utility classes required by new logic.
Inject BlockchainClient dependency to enable blockchain recording.
Inject FraudCheckClient dependency to enable AI fraud detection.
Add SLF4J logger instance for logging fraud and blockchain events.
Refactor createTransaction to include pre-processing fraud checks.
Refactor createTransaction to include asynchronous blockchain recording after save.
Add method to verify transaction integrity against the blockchain.
Add private helper method to perform fraud checks via the AI client.
Add private helper method to convert Transaction entity to Blockchain DTO.
